subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the Countenance and hath adorned himself with the ornament of his Lord's grace, the Almighty, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه و تزین بطراز عنایه ربه العزیز الحکیم و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant
